FullData.currentClassDescription: Masters of physical combat and unrivaled in close-quarter battles, warriors are the epitome of strength and valor on the battlefield.

newsItems.title: New Features Added / Bugfixes
newsItems.content:
• Delete option for your saved trees
• 'Open All Tooltips' toggle in the settings
• Edit icons now show above tooltips

newsItems.title: Paid Patreon Accounts are Coming January 1st
newsItems.content:
Everyone who logs in with a free Patreon account before January 1st will get Builder Tier for free forever.

Starting January 1st, I'll be charging $3 a month (the Builder Tier on Patreon) to host new trees (the share tree online button). All existing trees will continue to be hosted at no cost.

You can still save, download, input/upload files locally like normal without an account. It's only new clicks of the share tree online button that you'll need a Builder Tier Patreon account.

I've given the code away for free under MIT License. Feel free to host your own tool with no accounts, contribute features, or use it locally.

newsItems.title: New Features Added
newsItems.content:
• Improved mobile support
• Fixed mobile grid attachement when flipping device
• Fixed mobile skills moving when naming/editing

newsItems.title: New Features Added
newsItems.content: • Ctrl+Click to link from selected skills

newsItems.title: New Features Added
newsItems.content:
- Requirements Tooltip Added
When hovering over a skill, the unmet requirements are shown above the skill description. This can be toggled on and off globally in the settings under "Show Requirements Description".
- Mutually Exclusive Skills
- Edit Connection Window
- Set the cost of each skill level for individual skills (previously could only be 1).
- Set the skill selection color under "Tree Unlock Color" in the settings.
- "Add New Skill On Click" toggle in the settings. Turn this off to disable new skills being made when clicking or tapping an empty part of the tree.

newsItems.title: New Features Added
newsItems.content:
- Individual skill size, basic shapes, borders
- Mass skill edits

newsItems.title: New Features Added
newsItems.content:
- Setting for default skill icons for new skills
- Setting for default max skill points for new skills
- Removable custom images with an 'x' button in the top right of each custom image
- 'Auto Format Skills From Circle' button in the settings. This should branch skills evenly spaced from their root node.

newsItems.title: Welcome to Skill Tree Maker!
newsItems.content: Create amazing skill trees for your RPG characters and games. Drag and drop skills, connect them, and export as JSON!

FullData.patreonModalMessage:
Everyone who logs in with a free Patreon account before January 1st will get Builder Tier for free forever.

Starting January 1st, I'll be charging $3 a month (the Builder Tier on Patreon) to host new trees (the share tree online button). All existing trees will continue to be hosted at no cost.

You can still save, download, input/upload files locally like normal without an account. It's only new clicks of the share tree online button that you'll need a Builder Tier Patreon account.

I've given the code away for free under MIT License. Feel free to host your own tool with no accounts, contribute features, or use it locally.
